violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface * was not cleaned as frequently as required. - Clean in place equipment and cabinet faces require a more frequent cleaning.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)* were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. - Floors and walls throughout require thorough cleaning.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment * that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. - Ice machine due for cleaning.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)* were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. - Floors require more frequent cleaning.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
